image:image.image:title: Diamantino (2018)
image:image.image:caption: Art department on Gabriel Abrantes and Daniel Schmidt's political satire · Grand Prize, Semaine de la Critique, Cannes 2018.

image:image.image:title: All the Dreams in the World (2017)
image:image.image:caption: Production design on Laurence Ferreira Barbosa's France–Portugal feature about the Portuguese diaspora · produced by Paulo Branco / Leopardo Filmes.

image:image.image:title: Pela Boca Morre o Peixe (2014)
image:image.image:caption: Art department on João P. Nunes's Kafka-inflected horror short · Best Short Film, MOTELx 2014.

image:image.image:title: Lura (2013)
image:image.image:caption: Art direction on Luís Brás's adventure drama short · Marta's earliest credit on record.
